author: doll-agent
content: Added partial_fit() to FittedCategoricalNB. Restructured the fitted struct to store raw category_counts and class_counts. ferrolearn-extra: partial_fit transparently extends both classes and per-feature category lists when new values arrive (sklearn errors). Cached log probs and priors recomputed via shared recompute_feature_log_prob and resolve_class_log_prior helpers. Validated by api_proof_categorical_nb.
